title: gastridium lendigerum var. scabrum
intro: Gastridium lendigerum var. scabrum is an alternative name for the plant species Gastridium phleoides, commonly known as Gastridium or Rat's Tail Fescue, a type of grass native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gastridium lendigerum var. scabrum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and aiding in the treatment of various respiratory problems. Gastridium lendigerum var. scabrum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a medicinal plant.
